2603.28360.title: CoE: Collaborative Entropy for Uncertainty Quantification in Agentic Multi-LLM Systems
2603.28360.paper_summary: Uncertainty estimation in multi-LLM systems remains largely single-model-centric: existing methods quantify uncertainty within each model but do not adequately capture semantic disagreement across models. To address this gap, we propose Collaborative Entropy (CoE), a unified information-theoretic metric for semantic uncertainty in multi-LLM collaboration. CoE is defined on a shared semantic cluster space and combines two components: intra-model semantic entropy and inter-model divergence to the ensemble mean. CoE is not a weighted ensemble predictor; it is a system-level uncertainty measure that characterizes collaborative confidence and disagreement. We analyze several core properties of CoE, including non-negativity, zero-value certainty under perfect semantic consensus, and the behavior of CoE when individual models collapse to delta distributions. These results clarify when reducing per-model uncertainty is sufficient and when residual inter-model disagreement remains. We also present a simple CoE-guided, training-free post-hoc coordination heuristic as a practical application of the metric. Experiments on \textit{TriviaQA} and \textit{SQuAD} with LLaMA-3.1-8B-Instruct, Qwen-2.5-7B-Instruct, and Mistral-7B-Instruct show that CoE provides stronger uncertainty estimation than standard entropy- and divergence-based baselines, with gains becoming larger as additional heterogeneous models are introduced. Overall, CoE offers a useful uncertainty-aware perspective on multi-LLM collaboration.
2603.28360.paper_summary_zh: 不確定性估計在多LLM系統中仍然主要集中於單一模型：現有方法量化每個模型內部的不確定性，但未能充分捕捉模型之間的語義分歧。為了解決這一差距，我們提出了協作熵（CoE），這是一種統一的信息理論度量，用於多LLM協作中的語義不確定性。CoE 定義在共享語義聚類空間上，並結合了兩個組件：模型內語義熵和模型間對於集成均值的發散。CoE 不是加權集成預測器；它是一種系統級的不確定性度量，表徵協作信心和分歧。我們分析了 CoE 的幾個核心特性，包括非負性、在完美語義共識下的零值確定性，以及當個別模型崩潰為 delta 分佈時 CoE 的行為。這些結果澄清了在何種情況下減少每個模型的不確定性是足夠的，以及何時仍然存在剩餘的模型間分歧。我們還提出了一個簡單的 CoE 指導的、無需訓練的事後協調啟發式，作為該度量的實際應用。在使用 LLaMA-3.1-8B-Instruct、Qwen-2.5-7B-Instruct 和 Mistral-7B-Instruct 的 \textit{TriviaQA} 和 \textit{SQuAD} 上的實驗表明，CoE 提供了比標準熵和發散基準更強的不確定性估計，隨著額外異質模型的引入，增益變得更大。總體而言，CoE 為多LLM協作提供了一種有用的關注不確定性的視角。
2603.28360.author: Kangkang Sun et.al.
2603.28360.authors: Kangkang Sun, Jun Wu, Jianhua Li, Minyi Guo, Xiuzhen Che, Jianwei Huang
